start.tagline: Test your knowledge of Denmark's birds
start.modePhotoDesc: See a photo, pick the right name
start.modeNameDesc: See a name, pick the right photo

about.title: About {name}
about.intro: {name} is a free Danish bird quiz that helps you get to know the birds of Denmark. Guess the bird from photos and test your knowledge.
about.supportBody1: {name} is a volunteer project. It's made by me, Brian Jensen, a hobby bird enthusiast who wants to learn more about Danish birds and practise recognising the different species. Like the project? You can support it via MobilePay: {mobilePay}
about.supportBody2: Any surplus left after running costs (a bit of server hosting) goes to supporting Danish nature.
about.supportBody3: I have more ideas in the works and keep improving the quiz, but if you have suggestions or want to help with testing, photos or anything else, get in touch.

myResults.clearText: Your quiz results will be permanently removed from this device.
myResults.emptyText: Take your first quiz to track your score, your weak birds and your history.
myResults.title: Your results
myResults.subtitle: Based on {count, plural, one {# quiz} other {# quizzes}} on this device.
myResults.missedLatest: Birds you missed in the latest quiz ({count})
